description: Announce new features with an in-app card including image and action buttons.
extendedDescription: Display rich feature announcements within your app using a card format with an image, title, description, and primary/secondary action buttons. Perfect for product launches and major updates.

description: Display a dismissible banner for conferences, events, or important notices.
extendedDescription: Show a prominent, dismissible banner at the top of your app to promote conferences, webinars, or other time-sensitive announcements. Users can dismiss the banner once they've seen it.
